boundary: This runbook prepares a future clean-source pod session. It does not run cloud, does not authorize public wording, and must not be used with a copied dirty tree.
goal: Goal1172 clean-source RTX pod execution runbook

steps.name: clone_clean_source
steps.purpose: Start from a clean pushed commit, not a copied dirty local tree.

commands: DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y build-essential git cmake pkg-config libgeos-dev python3-dev python3-pip cuda-nvrtc-dev-13-0 cuda-cudart-dev-13-0
steps.name: install_linux_prerequisites
steps.purpose: Install strict-reference and native-build dependencies before running gates.

steps.name: prepare_optix_headers
steps.purpose: Point the build at OptiX headers compatible with the pod driver/CUDA setup.

commands: make build-optix OPTIX_PREFIX=$OPTIX_PREFIX CUDA_PREFIX=$CUDA_PREFIX NVCC=$NVCC 2>&1 | tee docs/reports/goal1170_clean_source_rtx_claim_grade_batch/make_build_optix.log
steps.name: build_native_optix
steps.purpose: Build the native OptiX backend once before preflight and app rows.

steps.name: preflight
steps.purpose: Fail fast before any benchmark if source or environment is not claim-grade ready.

steps.name: run_goal1170_batch
steps.purpose: Run all eight RTX rows in one pod session.

steps.name: package_copyback
steps.purpose: Copy back all logs and JSON artifacts before stopping the pod.
